sql: INSERT IGNORE INTO t (id, a) VALUES (1, 2)
setup_sql: CREATE TABLE t (id INTEGER, a INTEGER);
note: Python SQLGlot preserves INSERT IGNORE for SQLite; stock SQLite expects INSERT OR IGNORE.

sql: SELECT x FROM t LIMIT ALL
setup_sql: CREATE TABLE t (x INTEGER); INSERT INTO t VALUES (1), (2);
note: Python SQLGlot preserves LIMIT ALL for SQLite; stock SQLite rejects ALL in LIMIT.

setup_sql: CREATE TABLE t (x INTEGER); INSERT INTO t VALUES (1), (2);
note: Python SQLGlot preserves OFFSET without LIMIT for SQLite; stock SQLite requires a LIMIT clause.

sql: SELECT x SIMILAR TO 'a%' FROM t
setup_sql: CREATE TABLE t (x TEXT); INSERT INTO t VALUES ('abc');
note: Python SQLGlot preserves SIMILAR TO for SQLite; stock SQLite does not implement the predicate.

sql: SELECT * FROM t, LATERAL (SELECT 1) AS x
setup_sql: CREATE TABLE t (a INTEGER); INSERT INTO t VALUES (1);
note: Python SQLGlot preserves LATERAL for SQLite; stock SQLite rejects this form.
Python SQLGlot preserves LPAD for SQLite; stock SQLite does not provide LPAD by default.
Python SQLGlot preserves RPAD for SQLite; stock SQLite does not provide RPAD by default.
Python SQLGlot preserves SUBSTRING_INDEX for SQLite; stock SQLite does not provide SUBSTRING_INDEX by default.
